name: Notion Portfolio

metric.label: Scope
metric.value: 8 sections · multi-view databases · live CP stats

highlights: Built a Notion-inspired portfolio SPA with sidebar navigation, block-style sections, and detail sheets for experience, education, and projects.
Shipped multi-view sections — bento + table for projects, timeline + table for experience, kanban for certifications, and table/problems/topics for coding.
Integrated live Codolio stats with snapshot fallback for CP ratings, problem breakdowns, and topic heatmaps via Recharts.
Authored content as JSON with TypeScript types, pre-commit hooks, and a Vite + Tailwind 4 + shadcn/ui component stack.

name: GameVault
highlights: Built a containerized gaming platform with a 10-service Docker Compose core stack and an 8-container observability overlay.
Exposed the system through a React SPA and an Nginx API gateway routing to 5 independent Express backend services.
Integrated 3 data stores: PostgreSQL (users/auth via Prisma), Redis (token rotation & leaderboard cache), MongoDB (game state).
Instrumented services with OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Loki, Tempo, and 6 Grafana dashboards for full metrics/logs/traces correlation.

name: coldMail

metric.label: Scope
metric.value: 3 compose modes · Gemini AI · Gmail draft pipeline

highlights: Built a personal cold-mail workbench with MailID, CSV, and LinkedIn compose modes plus Gemini-powered name extraction, email patterns, and JD matching.
Managed template and PDF resume libraries in MongoDB with tag filters and merge tokens for personalised HTML drafts.
Saved every send to Gmail Drafts via IMAP APPEND — a Render free-tier-friendly path that skips blocked outbound SMTP.
Shipped as a React + Express monorepo with light/dark theme, rate-limited AI endpoints, and one-click Render deployment.

name: PriceTrackEr
highlights: Developed a price tracking website with automated price-drop alert functionality.
Integrated cron jobs for scheduled (7am daily) data scraping from Amazon, providing users with morning alerts.
Implemented AI-generated product descriptions (under 200 words each) for clarity and consistency.

name: File Organizer
highlights: Built a Bash script that sorts files into images, videos, docs, archives, and music folders by extension.
Added smart subfolders for screenshots and PDFs, with duplicate-name skipping to avoid overwrites.
Wrapped the CLI in a Python helper that installs the script, prompts for categories, and prints a move summary.

name: Sports Centre Booking
highlights: Built a web app for browsing sports centres and booking court slots by centre, sport, court, and time.
Fetched real-time slot availability from an Express API as users changed court and date selections.
Implemented user authentication with React Context and a responsive Chakra UI booking grid.

name: Image → LaTeX
highlights: Built a 5th-semester web app for uploading an image, previewing it, and generating a LaTeX equation.
Handled file uploads with Multer on an Express server and served the UI with EJS views.
Added a Python API layer for equation generation alongside client-side preview logic.
